heading: You've been researching for months. You're more confused than when you started.

items.title: Overwhelmed by jargon
items.description: ABSD, TDSR, MSR, CPF, MOP — every article you read adds three more acronyms to the pile.

items.title: Skeptical of agents
items.description: You've heard the stories — agents pushing overpriced properties for higher commissions. How do you find one you can trust?

items.title: Anxious about cash flow
items.description: Can you really afford the monthly? What happens if your situation changes? The uncertainty keeps you up at night.

items.title: Confused by timelines
items.description: Sell first or buy first? When does MOP end? When can you use CPF? The logistics feel impossible to untangle.
